short_text: Davey to Fayyaz Butt, Caught by Chris Greaves!! He's crunched that, but straight to the man at cover point. A wide yorke
full_text: Davey to Fayyaz Butt, Caught by Chris Greaves!! He's crunched that, but straight to the man at cover point. A wide yorker, and it's thrashed straight to Greaves, who takes the catch to bowl Oman out off the last ball of the innings.

short_text: Davey to Fayyaz Butt, , short outside off, Fayyaz Butt drags this with a pull to deep mid-wicket for four! Breathtaking
full_text: Davey to Fayyaz Butt, , short outside off, Fayyaz Butt drags this with a pull to deep mid-wicket for four! Breathtaking shot!

short_text: Davey to Bilal Khan, Bilal Khan Run Out!! 1 run completed. He's drilled a full-toss back down the ground, and they're co
full_text: Davey to Bilal Khan, Bilal Khan Run Out!! 1 run completed. He's drilled a full-toss back down the ground, and they're coming back for a second, but Bilal is sent back by his partner - sold down the river, and the bowler collect the ball to whip the bails off.

short_text: Davey to Zeeshan Maqsood, Caught by MacLeod!! That's a wide half-volley, and it looked like he'd cracked it into the sta
full_text: Davey to Zeeshan Maqsood, Caught by MacLeod!! That's a wide half-volley, and it looked like he'd cracked it into the stands, but that bottom-handed thwack has flown too flat and low to wide long-off where MacLeod plucks a simple catch.

short_text: Davey to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, stays back, tries to reverse-lap that over the keeper off the back of the bat, and mis
full_text: Davey to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, stays back, tries to reverse-lap that over the keeper off the back of the bat, and misses it completely

short_text: Davey to Fayyaz Butt, 1 run, full toss fired in towards leg-stump, whipped away to deep mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Davey to Fayyaz Butt, 1 run, full toss fired in towards leg-stump, whipped away to deep mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, full and wide outside off, Zeeshan Maqsood throws his hands at it to squeeze
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, full and wide outside off, Zeeshan Maqsood throws his hands at it to squeeze it away through point, misses it completely

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Fayyaz Butt, 1 run, oh, that's absolute chaos! Tries to scoop a very full ball from outside off, no le
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Fayyaz Butt, 1 run, oh, that's absolute chaos! Tries to scoop a very full ball from outside off, no leverage, goes straight up towards short fine leg, but there's a misunderstanding, and neither short fine leg nor the keeper go or it - and another chance goes begging...

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, fuller length ball on the boots, whipped away flat towards deep mid-wicket for
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, fuller length ball on the boots, whipped away flat towards deep mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, , into the hip, and he's swivelled into a breathtaking pullshot over deep square leg
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, , into the hip, and he's swivelled into a breathtaking pullshot over deep square leg for six! That was a cannon-ball that was launched 92 meters into the stands!

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Fayyaz Butt, 1 run, fuller length ball outside off, drilled down towards long-off for one

full_text: Davey to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, fuller length ball on the boots, clipped down towards mid-on for one

short_text: Davey to Suraj Kumar, Caught by Wheal!! That's short and pace off, and it's done the trick - just the accuracy of the bo
full_text: Davey to Suraj Kumar, Caught by Wheal!! That's short and pace off, and it's done the trick - just the accuracy of the bouncer. A wider one would have allowed more room to impart power, but one with the pace off at the head hasn't allowed him any pace to work with, and he's hooked it straight to Wheal at fine leg who takes an impressive tumbling catch.

full_text: Davey to Suraj Kumar, no run, full and wide, squeezed out to cover

full_text: Mark Watt to Suraj Kumar, 1 run, squeezes this yorker length ball into the off-side, the man from cover point runs in, and underarms the ball at the stumps whilst airborne! The batter is safe though...

full_text: Leask to Naseem Khushi, Caught by MacLeodl!! He gets on his knee and tries to fetch this from outside off, dragging a ball from outside off high in the air towards long-off where Wheal runs in and takes a terrific catch!

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Sandeep Goud, Caught by Chris Greaves!! There's a wicket against the run of play! Not the best ball, a half-volley on the pads, and despite the really good nous of the glance, he's picked ou the only man in the deep, flicking this down the throat of deep square leg where Greaves takes a sitter.

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, leg byes, 1 run, on the pads, worked off the legs to square leg for a quick single. L
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, leg byes, 1 run, on the pads, worked off the legs to square leg for a quick single. Leg-bye in fact...

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, , short ball, Zeeshan Maqsood arches back and upper-cuts this close to his body to th
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, , short ball, Zeeshan Maqsood arches back and upper-cuts this close to his body to third man for four. Flies away..

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Sandeep Goud, 1 run, on the pads, and that's glanced away to deep square leg for one

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, he's steepled that high in the air towards mid-off, the bowler hasn't attempte
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, he's steepled that high in the air towards mid-off, the bowler hasn't attempted to get to that, but the skipper has come across to take that, but has woefully misjudged that.. Just a missed opportunity. To add insult to injury, he's , and that would've been a run-out...

full_text: Chris Greaves to Sandeep Goud, 2 runs, straightens outside off, and that's a delicate late cut to third man for a couple

full_text: Chris Greaves to Zeeshan Maqsood, , now then, he's bowled one very high, and it's been pulled straight to the man at deep square leg for reckons the third umpire. The Scottish captain is fuming...

full_text: Chris Greaves to Sandeep Goud, 1 run, charges down the wicket and works it away against the spin towards mid-wicket for one

full_text: Chris Greaves to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, another flat and quick skidder outside off, chopped off the under-edge square of the wicket for a single

short_text: Mark Watt to Mohammad Nadeem, Caught by Berrington!! Oh what a sharp grab that is at cover. Full and in the slot, there
full_text: Mark Watt to Mohammad Nadeem, Caught by Berrington!! Oh what a sharp grab that is at cover. Full and in the slot, there to be hit, Nadeem went for a smash over cover. The shot was definitely on and he made great connection too. Unfortunate he didn't have the elevation or placement. Just as Oman were looking to break-free, Scotland hit back and Mark Watt roars.

short_text: Mark Watt to Mohammad Nadeem, , this is a nice little phase of aggression from Oman. Mark Watt overpitched this ball, Na
full_text: Mark Watt to Mohammad Nadeem, , this is a nice little phase of aggression from Oman. Mark Watt overpitched this ball, Nadeem cleared the front leg out and smashed it over long-on. Excellent hit

full_text: Mark Watt to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, flatter and on the leg stump, Maqsood flicks it to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Leask to Zeeshan Maqsood, , in the airrr, just brushes the fingertips. . Flatter and sliding outside off stump, Maqsood goes hard on the slash and gets a thick edge that flies towards short third man, fielder leaps and attempts a right-handed grab overhead but fails to pouch it

full_text: Wheal to Zeeshan Maqsood, , oh what a shot! A shot that makes a positive statement. Full and in the slot, Zeeshan Maqsood spotted mid-off is in, so he went aerial and the length was perfect for him to execute well.

full_text: Wheal to Mohammad Nadeem, , he's hit that on the rise, didn't sound right but who cares! Slot ball, Nadeem has spent some time to understand the pace of the wicket, went through with the flick-pull, clears deep mid-wicket

full_text: Leask to Aqib Ilyas, Caught by Munsey!! It's full, it's in the slot, but it's rushed him too. Aqib Ilyas goes for the loft, hits it flat and hits it straight down long-off's throat. The set batter gone. Elation for Scotland. This isn't going according to Oman's plan.

full_text: Mark Watt to Aqib Ilyas, , oh horrible misfield. This should have been two, but the fielder has overrun and the ball turned away from him too. Was a top edge on the sweep, shouts of catch it but fell well wide of deep backward square leg. The fielder not only overran, but slipped too

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Kashyap, Caught by Munsey!! Horrible slog to a ball that isn't in the slot. Short of a length delivery
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Kashyap, Caught by Munsey!! Horrible slog to a ball that isn't in the slot. Short of a length delivery, Kashyap loses shape looking to play leg-side, the ball hits him high on the bat and it's spliced only as far as mid-off for an easy catch. This is the problem of just coming out preplanned to attack than adapt to the pitch and react.

short_text: Wheal to Jatinder Singh, Jatinder Singh Run Out!! Huuuuge confusion and the crowd has been silenced because both batters
full_text: Wheal to Jatinder Singh, Jatinder Singh Run Out!! Huuuuge confusion and the crowd has been silenced because both batters are at the bowler's end. Jatinder Singh pushed this to mid-on and thought the run was on, set off, but his partner wasn't keen and he seemed to have grounded his bat in the crease before Jatinder Singh crossed him, so it's the striker who has to go back. Disastrous start for Oman as they lose one of their key batters.

short_text: Wheal to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, nice shape away from the right-hander on this good length delivery. Aqib Ilyas plays away fr
full_text: Wheal to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, nice shape away from the right-hander on this good length delivery. Aqib Ilyas plays away from the body and gets a thick edge that rolls wide of backward point to third man

short_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Berrington, , thumped into the deep mid-wicket orbit and . They will be playing Afghanistan next Mond
full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Berrington, , thumped into the deep mid-wicket orbit and . They will be playing Afghanistan next Monday in Sharjah. What a wonderful moment for the Scots...the dressing room looks cock-a-hoop and they offer a resounding reception to Berrington and Cross as they stroll back to the pavilion. Soon as Berrington hit this, he jumped in joy and pumped his fist before hugging his partner. Unparalleled joy.

short_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Berrington, , and there's the first of them! Clears his front leg and smacks the short ball over mid-
full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Berrington, , and there's the first of them! Clears his front leg and smacks the short ball over mid-wicket for a one-bounce boundary, the fielder in the deep had no chance...

full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Berrington, 1 run, soon as this went in the air the keeper went "Out hogaya (he's gone)" but uh-oh wasn't to be. Berrington went hard on the flatter delivery and sliced it off the thick outside half, only to fall teasingly wide of the backtracking backward point fielder. You could argue that the fielder could have been more alert, but it always seemed to be falling over him...

full_text: Khawar Ali to Coetzer, Bowled!! Done him with a wrong one, has he? Looped it up nicely and got the ball to skid through off the deck before beating Coetzer on the inside edge, the Scot skipper was trying to work it away on the leg-side and ends up sending the deflection off his thigh pad onto leg peg. Matthew Cross isn't too impressed at the other end.

full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Munsey, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! Munsey is on his way back! Short ball angling into the hip, swivels into a pull and in a rush of adrenaline, doesn't bother keeping it down, and Jatinder Singh, the only man in the deep, holds onto it and thigh-slaps himself sore.

full_text: Aqib Ilyas to Munsey, , into the pads, and he's switched stances to reverse-swat that to the square third man fence for four - over the man in the in-field. Breathtaking shot!
